calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Nov-16-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John H. O'Reilly telephone number 415-392-2860 for Plaintiff.
No other appearance was made on this matter.

Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS BROOKS STREET PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. and MELINDA MERRION'S Petition To Compel Arbitration and Appoint Neutral Arbitrator is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489. (302/EHG)
